title: RENT WELL - 211info
text: RENT WELL RENT WELL Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 15-hour tenant education course. The course is divided into 12 sections and can be taken in-person, on Zoom, or as a self-paced eCourse. The course covers fair housing laws, rental screening process, eviction process, credit repair and building, building a housing portfolio, how to maintain a healthy home, and how to address a previous eviction, criminal history, or other barriers. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Phone: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Classes: Varies Email (503) 515-1328 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 515-1328 Main phone Main phone (503) 515-1328 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to see current classes or to fill out an assessment for the eCourse. Additional intake varies by hosting agency. FEES: $0-$60 depending on hosting agency. The eCourse is no cost. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Tenant Readiness Education Programs If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
